features.name: inout port with IOBUF instantiation
features.description: Code should include a module with inout (bidirectional) ports that are connected to IOBUF-style buffer instances via named port connections

features.name: cross-connected buffer instances forming a loop
features.description: Code should include two module instances where the output of one feeds into the input of the other and vice versa, creating a signal loop

features.name: inverted signal as enable for IOBUF
features.description: Code should include an IOBUF-like instance where the output enable is driven by an inverted logic signal
